title: Venezuelan Chicken Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious bowl dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine, featuring tender chicken and a variety of colorful vegetables.
instructions: Rinse the chicken breast and pat it dry with a paper towel. Season with salt and pepper.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken breast for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the chicken to a plate and let it rest for a few minutes.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Add the diced red onion and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until softened.
Add the diced tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the veggie bowl seasoning and cook for 1 minute.
Fluff the cooked floral rice with a fork and stir in the chopped cilantro.
To assemble the bowls, slice the cooked chicken breast and place it on top of the rice mixture.
Add the sautéed vegetables and sliced avocado to the bowl.
